zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter de Frampton於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親John Frampton23歲，母親Mrs. John Frampton19歲。他於大約1360年與Margaret le Blount在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1389年10月14日在英國英格蘭多瑟特邦藍 利普爾斯享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Frampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, of which there are several in Gloucestershire, one in Dorset and one in Lincolnshire. Most take the name from the Frome river in south Gloucestershire (which is probably from a British word meaning ‘fair, brisk’) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. One near Tewkesbury was originally named in Old English as Frēolingtūn ‘settlement associated with Frēola’, a short form of any of various compound personal names with the first element frēo ‘free’. Frampton in Lincolnshire probably gets its name from an Old English byname Frameca (a derivative of fram ‘valiant’) + tūn.

variants.name: Frome
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, such as Frome (Somerset), Frome Saint Quintin, Frome Vauchurch, Frome Whitfield in Stinsford, the lost Frome Billet in West Stafford (all Dorset), Bishops Frome, Canon Frome, Castle Frome, and Prior's Frome and Larport (formerly Frome) both in Mordiford (all Herefordshire). Or a topographic name from the rivers on which these places are located, or simply a name for someone living beside a river of this name, which is probably cognate with Welsh ffraw ‘fair, fine, brisk’. Compare Frampton .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter de Frampton was born about 1330, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Frampton, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. John Frampton, was 19. He married Margaret le Blount about 1360, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 October 1389, in Buckland Ripers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter de Frampton est né environ 1330, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Frampton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Frampton, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret le Blount environ 1360, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1389, à Buckland Ripers, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter de Frampton(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Frampton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Frampton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국에서 Margaret le Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1389년 10월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 벅랜드 라이퍼스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter de Frampton родился около 1330 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Frampton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Frampton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret le Blount около 1360 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 октября 1389 г. в местности буккланд рипирс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
